items.name: Pool (Combat)
items.detail: max(5, history+6) [canonical: params/core.md §Combat Pool, ED-901/904 ratified]

items.name: Health (Full)
items.detail: WI×(MaxWounds+1) + 0.25×Strength×Endurance where WI = End+4+0.4×Spirit [canonical: derived_stats_v30 §4.1, D-A reshape ED-PC-0005]

items.name: Max Wounds
items.detail: min(floor(End/2) + 1, 3) [canonical: derived_stats_v30 §4.1, PP-717 cap; MAXWOUNDS_DIV=2, MAXWOUNDS_ADD=1, MAXWOUNDS_CAP=3]

items.name: Per-Die EV (μ, σ)
items.detail: TN6:(0.50,0.806) | TN7:(0.40,0.800) | TN8:(0.30,0.781) [canonical: params/core.md §Expected Value (per die)]

items.name: Degree Thresholds (Combat)
items.detail: Overwhelming: net≥2×Ob AND net≥3 | Success: net≥Ob | Partial: net>0<Ob | Failure: net≤0 [canonical: params/core.md §Degrees of Success]

items.name: Wound Ob Channel
items.detail: WOUND_ATK_OB=0.15 (attacking), WOUND_DEF_OB=0.25 (defending) per wound [canonical: ED-1041, ED-PC-0005 ratified 2026-07-08]

items.name: CFG (Combat Engine Coefficients)
items.detail: ~100+ tunable coefficients (L0=4.0, BASE_TEMPO=2.0, CONC_SPIRIT=2.0, CONC_FOCUS=3.0, INIT_SIGMA_K=0.16, etc.) [CLASS-C, exports to combat_engine_v1.json for Godot]

items.name: Faction Stats (Pre-LPS-1)
items.detail: {L, Sta, W, I, Mil} × {Crown, Church, Hafenmark, Varfell} [canonical: mc_v17.py; ⚠️ SUPERSEDED by LPS-1 ratified model per ED-FA-0004]

items.name: Readiness Constants (Contest)
items.detail: MAX=12, REGAIN=4, BASE=3, MARGIN=1.0, READING_COEFF=1/6, CAP=3.0, ETHOS_UNLOCK=0.5, LEAK_CAP=0.9, FLOOR=0.40 [canonical: designs/audit/2026-06-03-contest-groundup/primitives.py]

items.name: Contest Resolver Constants
items.detail: RES_FLOOR=0.15, REBUT_CAP=3.0, MERIT_SCALE=2.6, JITTER=0.08, PUBLIC_LEAK=0.5, INST_BIAS=0.6, PUB_BIAS=0.3, EVIDENCE_CAP=3.0 [SEED: sim-tunable]

items.name: MS Starting Value
items.detail: MS_START=60 [canonical: params/core.md; videogame canonical per Jordan 2026-06-06]

findings.claim: Concentration derived-value formula defined three ways across three surfaces: descriptor_registry (claims Charisma×3), params/core.md (defines Charisma×3), combatant.py (implements 3×Focus+2×Spirit)
findings.evidence: descriptor_registry.yaml:107 not_descriptors (Concentration); params/core.md:162 (Concentration = Charisma×3); combatant.py:141 (conc_max = 3*Focus + 2*Spirit via config.py:61 CONC_FOCUS/CONC_SPIRIT=3.0/2.0)

findings.claim: Concentration is referenced in Key stat_deltas payloads but has no registry key entry; stat_deltas vocabulary undefined
findings.evidence: keys.py:84 (Target.stat_deltas: dict, no schema); descriptor_registry.yaml scanned (lines 1-115: no key:'concentration'); propagation_spec_v1.md cites stat_deltas as load-bearing

findings.claim: stat_deltas payload accepts any string key with zero validation of stat_name vocabulary; substrate cannot enforce descriptor bindings
findings.evidence: keys.py:300-356 (_validate method): validates causes, roles, axes, scales, visibility, permanence, time_horizon — NOT stat_deltas keys. TypeRegistry.validate_payload() (line 239) checks required_payload_fields existence, not key semantics.

findings.claim: STAMINA_REF=18.0 (config.py:56) defined but never consumed; live code uses cfg-free combatant.py constants instead
findings.evidence: config.py:56 (STAMINA_REF=18.0); combatant.py:45-47 (stamina_max reads STAMINA_PER_END/STAMINA_PER_SPIRIT, not cfg); combatant.py:122 comment ('stamina_max (cfg-free)')

findings.claim: Two degree() functions coexist with different Overwhelming-bar contracts (combat=2×Ob vs contest=pool-aware); documented as intentional but still a naming collision
findings.evidence: dice_engine.py:94-122 (degree_from_net, Overwhelming net≥2·Ob AND ≥3); sigma_leverage.py:284-311 (degree, Overwhelming pool-aware). Reconciliation note lines 287-294 sigma_leverage.py explains intentional split.

findings.claim: params/core.md patch header (lines 4-6) cites old Combat Pool formula (Agi×2+History+3) as 'corrected' but actual implemented formula is correct (max(5,History+6))
findings.evidence: params/core.md:4 (PP-247 patch note); params/core.md:161 (correct formula, Agility-independent, ED-901/904). Prose is correct; docstring history is stale.

findings.claim: Faction model in game_state.py implements pre-LPS-1 SUPERSEDED schema (no Mandate, Treasury, settlement-scoped L/PS); LPS-1 ratified model unimplemented
findings.evidence: game_state.py:6-11 (explicit PRE-LPS-1 flag, ED-FA-0004 blocking); Faction dataclass lines 91-107 (lacks Mandate, Treasury, settlement keys). ED-FA-0004 Stratum-B open.

coverage_notes: F-SIM sweep completed over: (1) sim/substrate/keys.py (full read; Key/KeyLog/TypeRegistry/TickScheduler); (2) sim/autoload/dice_engine.py (full read); (3) sim/autoload/sigma_leverage.py (full read); (4) sim/autoload/game_state.py (partial 200 lines: initial state, Faction/Territory dataclasses); (5) designs/scene/combat_engine_v1/config.py (full 172 lines: CFG coefficients); (6) designs/scene/combat_engine_v1/combatant.py (full 151 lines: derived-stat formulas); (7) tests/sim/v32-combat-balance/r8_parity_harness.py (200 lines: harness constants); (8) sim/personal/contest/ (grep: resolver.py, primitives.py, modes.py constants); (9) sim/peninsular/ms_track.py, ci_track.py; sim/provincial/massbattle.py (grep: key constants). SKIPPED: full sim/personal/combat.py, sim/thread/*, sim/world/*, other v32-combat-balance test files (legacy harness), full massbattle.py (1000+ LOC), sim/tests/*. QUANTITIES: 127 named quantities extracted (derived values, code constants, pools, aggregates, dead constants). FINDINGS VERIFIED: 7 findings; P1×2 (Concentration collision + Faction PRE-LPS-1), P2×3 (stat_deltas unregistered + enforcement-gap + Degree synonym), P3×2 (STAMINA_REF dead + stale docstring). NEW: 5; KNOWN-TRACKED: 2 (ED-FA-0004, implied in game_state.py). No cross-silo collisions swept. BOUNDARIES: Did not adjudicate Concentration design call (needs PC/SC owner + Jordan pick). Did not re-litigate KNOWN-TRACKED items (ED-FA-0004, ED-1041, ED-904, ED-901 all properly cited). Live stat_deltas consumers (designs/scene/combat_engine_v1/core.py) outside F-SIM boundary (implementation layer, not substrate).
